# Legacy Browser Runtime Backup

> Deprecated. The default and only Git-tracked browser runtime is CloakBrowser.

The former FlareSolverr workflow has been removed from production code, default tests, CI, installers, and release packages. A local backup may exist at `legacy/flaresolverr/`, but that path is ignored by Git and is not distributed through GitHub or offline packages.

Use [`providers.md`](providers.md), [`deployment.md`](deployment.md), and [`architecture/overview.md`](architecture/overview.md) for the supported CloakBrowser runtime workflow.
